expectations.evidence: Lines 36-56 import icons from lucide-react (TrendingUp, Users, BarChart3, DollarSign, Settings, etc.)
Implements dark mode using state and conditional Tailwind classes (dark: prefix classes throughout)
Contains BarChart and PieChart components from recharts (lines 5-17) showing revenue trends and plan distribution
Contains Table component with customer list showing name, email, plan, status, revenue fields
Defines colors for purple, blue, green, pink themes used consistently throughout cards and UI
No emoji characters used as functional UI icons; all icons from lucide-react library
Responsive grid layouts using md: and lg: Tailwind breakpoints for mobile/tablet/desktop layouts
